creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 206717
Patch to upgrade sysutils/rubygem-fluentd to 1.6.3

Hello!

The latest stable and recommended version of fluentd is 1.6.3
Since there is no dependencies changed the patch for this upgrade is trivial.

This version brings in several bug-fixes and enhancements.
Full change-log is available at 
https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
